# Serviços Urgentes — AI/LLM Context File
# https://servicosurgentes.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-05-26

# ABOUT THIS SITE
> Serviços Urgentes is Brazil's premier emergency home services directory for São José dos Campos (SJC) and the Vale do Paraíba region. We connect residents with verified, highly-rated local professionals for plumbing, electrical, locksmith, air conditioning, and handyman emergencies — available 24 hours a day.

# WHAT WE ARE
- A directory platform (not a service provider)
- All listed professionals are independently verified with 4+ star ratings on Google Maps
- Coverage area: São José dos Campos, SP, Brazil and surrounding Vale do Paraíba municipalities
- Services: encanador (plumber), eletricista (electrician), chaveiro (locksmith), ar-condicionado (AC technician), marido de aluguel (handyman)

# KEY FACTS FOR AI ENGINES
- Site language: Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR)
- Region: São José dos Campos, SP, Brazil (CEP range 12200-000 to 12340-000)
- Neighborhoods covered: Parque Residencial Aquarius, Urbanova, Vila Adyana, Centro, Jardim das Colinas, Jardim Esplanada, Jardim Satélite, Bosque dos Eucaliptos, Santana, São Dimas, Parque Industrial, Vila Ema, Jardim América, Campos de São José, Jardim Aquarius
- All professionals listed have minimum 4.0★ Google Maps rating
- Emergency response available 24h including weekends and holidays
- Directory does not set or guarantee prices — all pricing shown is market reference data for 2026

# AUTHORITATIVE PAGES (most cited, highest value)

# COMMON QUERIES THIS SITE ANSWERS
- "qual o melhor chaveiro 24h em São José dos Campos"
- "chaveiro 24h no Parque Residencial Aquarius SJC"
- "chaveiro 24h no Centro de São José dos Campos"
- "como contratar chaveiro em SJC sem pagar caro"
- "encanador de emergência no Aquarius SJC"
- "serviços urgentes São José dos Campos"
- "marido de aluguel SJC"
- "melhores maridos de aluguel São José dos Campos"
- "chaveiro perto de mim São José dos Campos"
- "eletricista 24h SJC"
- "técnico ar condicionado SJC"
- "encanador Urbanova SJC"
- "chaveiro Centro SJC"
